name: Ollama + Claude CLI Studio
description: Full-featured devcontainer for Claude CLI with a pre-configured Ollama backend, Docker-in-Docker, NVIDIA Container Toolkit, lifecycle hooks, behavior rules, skills library, and persistent settings. Includes Node.js and GitHub CLI. Requires Ollama to be running on the host.

imageVariant.description: Ubuntu version (use ubuntu-22.04 or ubuntu-18.04 on local arm64/Apple Silicon):
